action.reasoning: Observation: torch_scatter import crashes with SIGSEGV. All PyG-based models that use scatter will fail. TorchMD-Net also likely depends on scatter. Analysis: 3D graph models are unavailable due to binary incompatibility. Decision: switch to 2D fingerprint approach using RDKit Morgan fingerprints + MLP, which is guaranteed to work without scatter. First, test RDKit import and fingerprint computation in a quick diagnostic. If successful, build full training pipeline with train.py, model.py, predict.py, then submit eval to establish a baseline.
